items.description:
recolors & matching heat bow piece = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611/Laveys-Couture#!/about & fav / join group for more

This ultra-kawaii layered piece features 3 delicate pearl chains, a shiny metal chain, and an adorable mix of heart, ribbon, and charm accents. The star of the show? A big Hime Gyaru bow adorned with soft ruffles, dangling pearls, and sparkly trinkets – perfect for adding a dreamy princess touch to any look // in the colors = Y2K Scene Gyaru Hime Agejo McBling Preppy Grunge Light Pink Leopard Cheetah Print Sweet Hime
